current_state.head: d8dc7e845d3a7618fdf41525b67b8bac83d05d28
current_state.hypothesis: The activation ExecutionContext and explicit safe observation tags are sufficient for extensions to correlate session, work, channel, role, tool, and terminal events without exporting config.

assignment: DKR-3. Probe the current extension and observable APIs. Produce a trace contract for one GitHub issue activation covering session, activation, work, channel, role, tool, parentage, success, error, cancellation, close, and sink flush. Determine whether the smallest change belongs in Lite core, the observable extension, or SDK observation tags. Prove that arbitrary tags and sensitive session config are not exported. Prefer an explicit safe projection. Return a saved replay checker and candidate checkpoint; do not implement product changes.
budget_and_stop_rule: At most two probe iterations or 75 minutes. Stop when a replayable trace and forbidden-value scan distinguish the options, or when an unknown requires a separate DKR.
hand_back_rule: Do not redesign session ownership, cancellation, queue workers, or publication. Hand those unknowns back to their named DKRs.

output_schema.decision_target: smallest safe observation projection and extension change
output_schema.source_of_truth: saved observation probe and current extension source
output_schema.decision: candidate only; never accepted by this worker

in_progress_influence_rule: In-progress worker narrative is not evidence; only worker progress, check-ins, metric reads, flags, or accepted checkpoints can influence the next dispatch.
